message:
fix: update all container image references to use published devcontainer image

- Change default image from packnplay-default to packnplay/devcontainer
- Update all fallback image references across codebase
- Fix failing tests to expect new image name
- This resolves permission issues since CI builds publish to packnplay/devcontainer

The refresh-container command will now pull from the image that's actually
being published by GitHub Actions rather than an inaccessible repository.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -71,7 +71,7 @@ jobs:
         with:
           context: .devcontainer
           push: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push' }}
-          tags: ghcr.io/obra/packnplay-default:latest
+          tags: ghcr.io/obra/packnplay/devcontainer:latest
           platforms: linux/amd64,linux/arm64
           cache-from: type=gha
           cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 BINARY := packnplay
 
 # Container image
-IMAGE := ghcr.io/obra/packnplay-default:latest
+IMAGE := ghcr.io/obra/packnplay/devcontainer:latest
 
 # Go parameters
 GOCMD := go

@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ Configuration:
   Credentials: ~/.local/share/packnplay/credentials/
   Worktrees:   ~/.local/share/packnplay/worktrees/
 
-Default container: ghcr.io/obra/packnplay-default:latest
+Default container: ghcr.io/obra/packnplay/devcontainer:latest
   Includes: Node.js, Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini, GitHub CLI,
             GitHub Copilot, Qwen Code, Cursor CLI, Sourcegraph Amp
